actionable_feedback: Untruncate control_note.md: include the full decision table and ensure the file preview (and final file) contains the complete table so automated previewing and human verifiers can validate the tie-backs. Deliverable: updated control_note.md with full decision table visible.

Add an explicit CSV citation block in control_note.md: include the exact CSV header plus the row block (header + all rows) in a single code block to help automated cross-checks. Deliverable: new section 'CSV citation' with header and rows verbatim.

Document recommended default handling for unresolved boundary states: for each 'needs_review' cell (initial/terminal velocity/acceleration) provide one or two recommended default strategies (e.g., assume zero, request explicit boundary values, or use nearest-neighbor/extrapolation) plus rationale and downstream impact. Deliverable: short subsection 'Boundary-handling recommendations' in control_note.md.

Clarify semantic-evaluation status in control_note.md: explicitly state that the provided calculations are finite-difference checks and that no separate semantic validation or solver-based optimization was performed. Avoid asserting any file-level semantic correctness score in your deliverables. Deliverable: single sentence near top of control_note.md clarifying scope.

Add a compact validation table tying maxima to CSV row indices/times: list v_max, |a|_max, |j|_max and cite the CSV row index/time where each occurs to support automated verification. Deliverable: 'Compact validation table' subsection.
artifact_specific_comments: {'path': 'attempts/baseline/[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]', 'comment': 'Decision table preview was truncated. Expand full table and include explicit row/time citations.'}
feedback_summary: Baseline attempt meets artifact-contract requirements and numerical checks (velocity, acceleration, jerk) based on previews. Two non-critical issues were flagged by the verifier: (1) internal inconsistency where parts of the grader output include non-null semantic correctness scores despite the deterministic precheck declaring that semantic correctness was not evaluated, and (2) the control_note.md decision table preview was truncated in artifact previews, limiting full automatic/human verification of tie-backs. Recommend addressing both to improve verifiability and avoid unsupported semantic claims.

noted_issues.message: Some nested grader/model outputs include non-null semantic correctness scores despite deterministic_precheck stating semantic correctness was not evaluated.
noted_issues.suggested_fix: Remove/clear semantic correctness assertions from artifact outputs and add an explicit scope statement in control_note.md clarifying that semantic correctness was not performed, or (if you can) provide evidence and perform a semantic evaluation to justify populated semantic scores.
